name: Spotted Gum
weathering: can weather to a silver-grey if left unfinished
design_character: Warm, robust, and well suited to expressive external timber applications.

name: Blackbutt
properties: lighter in tone than many hardwoods
weathering: softens and silvers over time externally
detailing_considerations: protect vulnerable junctions from trapped water
pair with stainless steel fixings in exposed environments
design_character: Clean, contemporary Australian hardwood with good versatility.

name: Ironbark
weathering: dark tone can soften with age
detailing_considerations: careful coordination needed at fine junctions
design_character: Powerful, structural, and suited to robust expressed applications.

name: Tasmanian Oak
weathering: better suited to internal use unless carefully protected
detailing_considerations: should not be treated as a highly durable external hardwood
works well in refined joinery conditions
design_character: Soft, refined, and useful for calmer interior timber expression.

name: Corten Steel
weathering: develops a rust-like patina over time
detailing_considerations: avoid unwanted staining onto adjacent surfaces
detail for drainage and separation where necessary
design_character: Textured, industrial, expressive, and strong in contrast with timber or stone.

name: Zinc
design_character: Quiet, refined, and excellent for elegant thin-sheet expression.

name: Stainless Steel
weathering: retains finish well in harsh environments
detailing_considerations: works well for fixings with durable timbers
can read as precise and highly resolved

name: Concrete
weathering: can stain, crack, and patinate over time depending on exposure
detailing_considerations: surface finish and formwork logic affect final quality
design_character: Massive, grounded, and capable of refined or raw expression.

name: Sandstone
weathering: ages with surface variation and patina
detailing_considerations: junctions with lighter materials should be clearly resolved

name: Limestone
weathering: can develop a soft aged appearance
detailing_considerations: coordinate support and fixing methods carefully
works well in calm, refined assemblies
